member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Helpers.ColorHelper
member.summary: Provides extension methods for converting between Avalonia and System.Drawing color types.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Helpers.ColorHelper.ToAvaloniaColor(System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Converts a to an Avalonia .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Helpers.ColorHelper.ToDrawingColor(Avalonia.Media.Color)
member.summary: Converts an Avalonia to a .

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventArgs
member.summary: Routed event arguments for , containing the submitted command text.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventArgs.CommandText
member.summary: Gets the submitted command text.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventArgs.#ctor(Avalonia.Interactivity.RoutedEvent,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventArgs
member.summary: Routed event arguments for , containing raw key bytes sent to the session.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventArgs.KeyData
member.summary: Gets the raw key data that was sent to the terminal session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventArgs.#ctor(Avalonia.Interactivity.RoutedEvent,System.Object,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox
member.summary: A small command entry control (prompt + input + submit button) that can optionally send submitted commands into an attached .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.SessionProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.InputTextProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.IsInputEnabledProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.PromptProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.CommandSubmittedEvent
member.summary: Defines the routed event.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.KeyPressedEvent
member.summary: Defines the routed event.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.Session
member.summary: Gets or sets the target . If set, submitted commands and special keys are sent to the session.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.InputText
member.summary: Gets or sets the current input text.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.IsInputEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the input box is enabled.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.Prompt
member.summary: Gets or sets the prompt label text displayed before the input box (for example, > ).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.CommandSubmitted
member.summary: Occurs when a special key (VT sequence) is pressed and forwarded. Routed event (bubbling).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.KeyPressed
member.summary: Occurs when the user submits a command (Enter or submit button). Routed event (bubbling).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache
member.summary: Resolves instances for the primary font and fallback families, maps codepoints to glyph indices (with fallback), and exposes font metrics for grid layout. Glyph lookups are cached per codepoint.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.IsValid
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the cache has been configured with a primary typeface.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.CellWidth
member.summary: Gets the width of a single terminal cell in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.CellHeight
member.summary: Gets the height of a single terminal cell in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.Ascent
member.summary: Gets the font ascent above the baseline in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.UnderlinePosition
member.summary: Gets the underline position relative to the baseline in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.UnderlineThickness
member.summary: Gets the underline thickness in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.StrikethroughPosition
member.summary: Gets the strikethrough position relative to the baseline in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.StrikethroughThickness
member.summary: Gets the strikethrough thickness in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.Primary
member.summary: Gets the primary configured .
member.exception: Thrown when the cache has not been configured.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.Configure(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Rebuilds the cache for the given primary family, size, line-height, and fallbacks.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.GetGlyph(System.Text.Rune)
member.summary: Resolves the (typeface, glyph) for a codepoint, trying fallbacks when absent.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.GetVariant(Avalonia.Media.FontWeight,Avalonia.Media.FontStyle)
member.summary: Weight/style variant of the primary typeface for bold/italic runs.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the primary and fallback typefaces and clears the glyph cache.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection
member.summary: A rectangular text selection in buffer coordinates (start/end inclusive, normalized so Start ≤ End). Used by to highlight selected cells.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection.StartY
member.summary: The row index of the selection start (inclusive, normalized).
Gets or sets the start x.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection.StartX
member.summary: The column index of the selection start (inclusive, normalized).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection.EndY
member.summary: The row index of the selection end (inclusive, normalized).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection.EndX
member.summary: The column index of the selection end (inclusive, normalized).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new selection, normalizing the coordinates so start ≤ end.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection.Contains(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified cell is within the selection.
member.param: The row index of the cell.
The column index of the cell.
member.returns: true if the cell is inside the selection; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer
member.summary: Paints terminal rows using : coalesces same-style cells into runs, resolves default/inverse/conceal colors, draws backgrounds, underlines, strikethrough, overline, and the cursor. Positioning is column-based (monospace advance assumption); wide glyphs render at single-cell width in Phase 1.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer._emSize
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the current object.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.IsValid
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the renderer has a valid font configuration.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.CellSize
member.summary: Gets the size of a single terminal cell.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.Baseline
member.summary: Gets the font baseline offset from the top of a cell.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.CellWidth
member.summary: Gets the width of a single terminal cell in pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.CellHeight
member.summary: Gets the height of a single terminal cell in pixels.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.Configure(System.String,System.Double,VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions)
member.summary: Configures the renderer with the specified font family, size, and terminal options.
member.param: The font size in device-independent pixels.
The terminal options controlling colors, line height, and fallbacks.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the glyph cache and rendering resources.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.RenderCursor(Avalonia.Media.DrawingContext,System.Int32,VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CursorShape)
member.summary: Renders the cursor shape at column (row-local y=0). The caller decides visibility by clearing the cursor group when the cursor should be hidden.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.RenderRow(Avalonia.Media.DrawingContext,System.Span{VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo},System.Nullable{VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection},System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a single row into (local origin = row top-left).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl
member.summary: A customizable, xterm-compatible virtual terminal control. Renders a via a (GlyphRun), feeds keyboard/mouse through xterm encoders, supports text selection, and exposes cursor/palette/scrollback customization via StyledProperties.

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TitleChanged
member.summary: Raised when the connected program changes the title (OSC 0/1/2).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Bell
member.summary: Raised on BEL.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CurrentSession
member.summary: Gets or sets the active terminal session rendered by this control.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalFontSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the terminal font size in device-independent pixels.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalFontFamily
member.summary: Gets or sets the terminal font family name.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cursor is visible.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.AllowDirectInput
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether keyboard input is forwarded directly to the session. When false, key presses and text input are not sent to .

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollDownVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the floating "scroll to bottom" indicator is shown when the viewport is scrolled back into history.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorShape
member.summary: Gets or sets the shape of the cursor.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the cursor color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollbackLines
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of scrollback lines retained.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.LineHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the line height multiplier (1.0 = default).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Options
member.summary: Gets the terminal options instance used by the underlying decoder.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CurrentBuffer
member.summary: Gets the current screen buffer, or null if no session is attached.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorPosition
member.summary: Gets the current cursor position in buffer coordinates.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CopyCommand
member.summary: Copies the current selection to the clipboard.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.PasteCommand
member.summary: Pastes the clipboard content into the session.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.SelectAllCommand
member.summary: Selects the whole visible screen.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ClearCommand
member.summary: Clears the terminal screen and scrollback.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class and creates render, blink, and resize timers.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Clear
member.summary: Sends a clear-screen + home escape sequence to the active session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.SelectAll
member.summary: Selects the entire visible screen.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollBy(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scrolls the viewport by (positive = up into history).
member.param: Number of lines to scroll. Positive values scroll up into history, negative scroll down toward the live bottom.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollToBottom
member.summary: Snaps the viewport back to the live bottom of the buffer.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollOffset
member.summary: Current scrollback offset (0 = live). Exposed for future scrollbar UI.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.GetCellPosition(Avalonia.Input.PointerEventArgs)
member.summary: Gets the cell position under the specified pointer event, or (-1,-1) if outside the terminal surface.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Dispose
member.summary: Stops timers, detaches from the decoder and releases rendering resources.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalCommand
member.summary: Reusable ICommand implementation that forwards Execute/CanExecute to a .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl},System.Func{VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new command.
member.param: Action invoked when the command executes.
Predicate that determines whether the command can execute.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalCommand.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the command.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalCommand.InvalidateCanExecute
member.summary: Raises .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CurrentSessionProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorVisibleProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.AllowDirectInputProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollDownVisibleProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalFontSizeProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TerminalFontFamilyProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorShapeProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorColorProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollbackLinesProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.LineHeightProperty
member.summary: Defines the styled property.
